race.comment: Our feature of the day where TOM KITTEN (1) is looking for back-to-back Group Ones, sitting handy in the All-Star Mile last time and proving too strong late. His recent 2000m form has been rock solid behind the likes of Via Sistina and he did bolt in with a Spring Champion over the trip as a 3yo. Drawn a touch sticky but if he can slot in midfield he's the one to beat. BIRDMAN (5) is flying. His past two wins have been very good, charging home with strong splits. He should relish a fast 2000m here and can raise the bar again. PRIDE OF JENNI (8) tried hard in the All-Star Mile, looking a spent force at the 200m but kicking on strongly for third. She did have the pattern onside there and 2000m if they stick with her early might be an issue. LIGHT INFANTRY MAN (2) won this last year in a brutal affair. He could get that again here with Jenni engaged, he looks a big price. SABAJ (6) got home well in the All-Star Mile, he has to come into consideration off that.
